revisions.long: Generate a natural, clear male child voice of a 8 year old boy. Sound small yet confident, using a moderate pace and neutral intonation. The tone should be engaging, friendly, and relatable for ESL learners. [Directives: Speak the provided text once. Read the text VERBATIM. No ad-libs. Do not speak these instructions.]
revisions.short: Natural, clear male child, 8 years old, confident, moderate pace, neutral intonation. [Directives: Speak the provided text once. Read the text VERBATIM. No ad-libs. Do not speak these instructions.]
revisions.changelog: 오디오 태그로 디렉션 제공, 발화 횟수 한번으로 강제
